sizing_rule.note: Round calculated position size DOWN to nearest round lot (e.g., 300 shares instead of 319-320) to avoid odd-lot markup costs that exceed precision benefits. This is a rounding rule applied post-calculation, not a primary sizing method.

source_rule_text: Avoid purchasing odd lots (fractional round lots) due to markup costs that reduce expected return; instead buy only round lots even if it means holding slightly different position sizes.
